note: Per-agent deposit amounts for the Sepolia HecateVault demo. Scaled DOWN from the local fixtures (10 ETH / 20000 USDC) to fit faucet-sized agent wallets. The matcher operates on ratios so the demo's matching logic is unchanged at these scaled amounts: A sells 0.0001 ETH at limit 3580 mUSDC/ETH; B buys 0.00004 ETH; C buys some; D tries to buy but is underfunded.
